title: micrampelis glutinosa
intro: Micrampelis glutinosa, also known as Sticky Wintergreen or Clammy Wintergreen, is a type of evergreen shrub that belongs to the heath family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Micrampelis glutinosa include its potential to relieve pain and reduce inflammation, as well as its ability to act as a natural expectorant, helping to clear mucus from the lungs. The herbal preparations of Micrampelis glutinosa include tea infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which are often used to soothe sore muscles and joints.
